mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.dim_customer ( customer_key, tenant, last_synced_at, email, first_name, last_name, phone, customer_status, customer_tier, segment, registered_date, last_login_at, last_active_at, email_verified, phone_verified, city, state, pincode, total_orders, total_spent, avg_order_value, ltv, last_purchase_date, total_returns, return_rate, churn_risk, fraud_score ) SELECT u.id, u.tenant, NOW(), u.email, u.first_name, u.last_name, u.phone, u.state_id, u.customer_tier, CASE WHEN u.state_id = 'SUSPENDED' THEN 'SUSPENDED' WHEN ord_agg.total_orders IS NULL OR ord_agg.total_orders = 0 THEN 'NEW' WHEN ord_agg.total_spent > 5000000 THEN 'VIP' WHEN ord_agg.total_spent > 1000000 THEN 'HIGH_VALUE' ELSE 'REGULAR' END, u.created_time, u.last_login_at, u.last_active_at, u.email_verified, u.phone_verified, addr.city, addr.state, addr.postal_code, COALESCE(ord_agg.total_orders, 0), COALESCE(ord_agg.total_spent, 0), CASE WHEN COALESCE(ord_agg.total_orders, 0) > 0 THEN (ord_agg.total_spent / ord_agg.total_orders) ELSE 0 END, COALESCE(ord_agg.total_spent, 0), ord_agg.last_order_date, COALESCE(ord_agg.total_returns, 0), CASE WHEN COALESCE(ord_agg.total_orders, 0) > 0 THEN (COALESCE(ord_agg.total_returns, 0) * 10000 / ord_agg.total_orders) ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN ord_agg.last_order_date IS NULL THEN 'HIGH' WHEN ord_agg.last_order_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days' THEN 'HIGH' WHEN ord_agg.last_order_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END, 0 FROM hm_user.user_profiles u LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT city, state, postal_code FROM hm_user.user_address WHERE user_id = u.id AND is_default = true LIMIT 1 ) addr ON true LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) as total_orders, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as total_spent, MAX(created_time) as last_order_date, 0 as total_returns FROM hm_order.orders WHERE customer_id = u.id ) ord_agg ON true

INSERT INTO hm_query.customer_360_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, customer_id, first_name, last_name, email, phone, customer_status, customer_tier, registered_date, last_login_at, last_active_at, email_verified, phone_verified, city, state, pincode, segment, total_orders, total_spent, avg_order_value, first_order_date, last_purchase_date, ltv, total_returns, return_rate, reviews_given, churn_risk, days_since_last_purchase, fraud_score, open_tickets, total_tickets, wishlist_count, active_cart_value ) SELECT u.id, u.tenant, NOW(), u.id, u.first_name, u.last_name, u.email, u.phone, u.state_id, u.customer_tier, u.created_time, u.last_login_at, u.last_active_at, u.email_verified, u.phone_verified, addr.city, addr.state, addr.postal_code, CASE WHEN u.state_id = 'SUSPENDED' THEN 'SUSPENDED' WHEN ord_agg.total_orders IS NULL OR ord_agg.total_orders = 0 THEN 'NEW' WHEN ord_agg.total_spent > 5000000 THEN 'VIP' WHEN ord_agg.total_spent > 1000000 THEN 'HIGH_VALUE' ELSE 'REGULAR' END, COALESCE(ord_agg.total_orders, 0), COALESCE(ord_agg.total_spent, 0), CASE WHEN COALESCE(ord_agg.total_orders, 0) > 0 THEN (ord_agg.total_spent / ord_agg.total_orders) ELSE 0 END, ord_agg.first_order_date, ord_agg.last_order_date, COALESCE(ord_agg.total_spent, 0), 0, 0, COALESCE(review_agg.review_count, 0), CASE WHEN ord_agg.last_order_date IS NULL THEN 'HIGH' WHEN ord_agg.last_order_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days' THEN 'HIGH' WHEN ord_agg.last_order_date < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'LOW' END, COALESCE(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (NOW() - ord_agg.last_order_date))::INT, 9999), 0, 0, 0, COALESCE(wish_agg.wish_count, 0), COALESCE(cart_agg.cart_value, 0) FROM hm_user.user_profiles u LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT city, state, postal_code FROM hm_user.user_address WHERE user_id = u.id AND is_default = true LIMIT 1 ) addr ON true LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) as total_orders, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) as total_spent, MIN(created_time) as first_order_date, MAX(created_time) as last_order_date FROM hm_order.orders WHERE customer_id = u.id ) ord_agg ON true LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) as review_count FROM hm_product.product_reviews WHERE user_id = u.id ) review_agg ON true LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COUNT(*) as wish_count FROM hm_wishlist.wishlist_items WHERE user_id = u.id ) wish_agg ON true LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total), 0) as cart_value FROM hm_cart.cart WHERE customer_id = u.id AND state_id = 'ACTIVE' ) cart_agg ON true
